verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Hosanna, hosanna, hosanna in the highest! Hosanna, hosanna, hosanna in the highest!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord, we lift up Your name with hearts full of praise, Be exalted, O Lord, my God! Hosanna in the highest!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Glory, glory, glory to the King of kings! Glory, glory, glory to the King of kings!
